query:
INSERT INTO quick_access_links (category, label, href, emoji, color, sortOrder)
VALUES (
  'スプレッドシート',
  'R8.4月緊急携帯１・２当番表',
  'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NyTMfhqXYnISiKm3mOm8GPWwxGy-KHLuBbmEA6Z7C2A/edit?gid=0#gid=0',
  '📱',
  'text-emerald-600',
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM quick_access_links WHERE category LIKE '%スプレッドシート%')
);
